_comment: Per-host source overrides for crawl-host-firecrawl.mjs. Without an entry, a host defaults to its pricing-page URL (or basicInfo.websiteUrl) for facts + its derived Trustpilot page for reputation. The overview page is noisy — point a host at its DEEP features/specs pages here to cut false diffs. Shape: "<hostId>": { "siteUrls": ["https://host.com/features", "https://host.com/web-hosting"], "reputationUrl": "https://www.trustpilot.com/review/host.com" }
